steps.title: Identify the triangle type
steps.content: The figure shows a right triangle with both acute angles labeled $45^{\circ}$. A right triangle with two equal acute angles is an isosceles right triangle.

steps.title: Use equal legs
steps.content: In an isosceles right triangle, the two legs have equal length. One leg is labeled $24$ and the other leg is labeled $x$, so $x=24$. That matches Choice A — $24$.
